title: phlegmariurus phlegmarioides
intro: Phlegmariurus phlegmarioides, also known as the Phlegmariurus or the Walking Fern, is a type of epiphytic fern native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus phlegmarioides include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
